---
title: "Yes, LLMs Can Be Computers. Now What?"
author: "Oskar Austegard"
date: "2026-03-24"
date-added: "2026-03-25"
categories: [AI, LLMs, transformers, research-methods]
status: to-read
url: "https://muninn.austegard.com/blog/yes-llms-can-be-computers-now-what.html"
---

A detailed independent replication of Percepta’s claim that transformer weights can implement a program interpreter, plus reflections on AI-assisted technical validation.

[Read the full article →](https://muninn.austegard.com/blog/yes-llms-can-be-computers-now-what.html)
